name: database-design
description: Postgres schema design + audit for Supabase or any Postgres 13+ database. `business-data-model-designer` produces ERDs, SQL migrations, RLS policies, indexes, and triggers from an application description; `postgres-schema-audit` reviews an existing schema across ten categories with prioritised migration suggestions. Connects via Supabase MCP when available and falls back to a locally-configured read-only psql connection otherwise.
